annotations.label: text
annotations.rawText: Consent of Independent Registered Public Accounting Firm

annotations.label: text
annotations.rawText: We hereby consent to the use in the Prospectus constituting a part of this Registration Statement of our report dated June 17, 2024, relating to the consolidated financial statements of Cerebras Systems Inc., which is contained in that Prospectus.

annotations.label: text
annotations.rawText: We also consent to the reference to us under the caption 'Experts' in the Prospectus.

annotations.label: text
annotations.rawText: /s/ BDO USA, P.C. San Jose, California September 30, 2024
